name: Blueberry Fritters with Sherry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add milk and well-beaten egg yolks. Beat until smooth.
3. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites and blueberries. Drop by spoonfuls into hot fat.
4. Fry until brown. Drain on paper towels.
5. Dust with powdered sugar.
Sherry Sauce:
1. Combine softened butter and powdered sugar. Beat until fluffy.
2. Add egg yolks, one at a time, and beat well after each addition.
3. Pour in sherry and cook over simmering water, stirring constantly, until thickened.
4. Fold in stiffly beaten egg white and blend thoroughly.
5. Serve immediately with fritters.
